capability_assertions.positive: Service repositories with explicit delivery evidence are admitted as deployable units.
capability_assertions.negative: Utility or ambiguous multi-Dockerfile repositories remain provenance-only unless stronger evidence exists.

capability_assertions.positive: GitHub Actions workflow checkout and reusable workflow evidence resolves to repository relationships.
Jenkinsfile controller artifacts surface in repository context and story responses.
Jenkins-to-Ansible handoff preserves playbook, inventory, group vars, host vars, and role hints.
Compose build, image, ports, and depends_on evidence surface without upgrading local runtime evidence to production deployment truth.
ArgoCD Application evidence links service repositories to deployment repositories and shared config.
Terraform stack evidence resolves module and service relationships without relying on repo-name coincidence.
